form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming favourite; scored a big 4 len win at Dortmund February 1 over 2500m defeating Valentino Dancer carrying 54kg at $2.90. Last start 2nd in a small field at Mannheim on March 28 over 2500m, 5.5 len behind Sukiyo with 59.5kg at $1.70. Strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Cologne October 12 over 2200m, soft track; 8 len behind Niclas with 58.5kg at $2.90. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at this track April 13 over 2200m, 1.5 len behind Early Spirit with 55kg at $4.30. Best form gives him a decent chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Not seen since winning to post a big 3.5 len win. Munich November 8 over 2200m slow track defeating Wazlaw carrying 58kg at $3.90. On debut favourite; won by 1.5 len Hannover June 20 over 2000m defeating Anna Rocca carrying 56.5kg at $2.90. Not without claims.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign second last of 12 at Rome in the LR October 26 over 2800m, on rain affected going; 33 len behind Naughty Peter with 56.5kg at $5.05. When resuming last campaign fourth of 10 at Baden Baden September 6 over 2400m, 2.25 len behind Free Folie carrying 55.5kg at $6.20. Unlikely to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second in a small field at this track June 21 over 2200m, 0.8 len behind Aster with 60kg at $3.30. Previous preparation first-up won by head this track April 13 over 2200m defeating Avola with 52.5kg at $7. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign by 2 len Munich November 8 over 2000m slow track defeating Kolumban carrying 56.5kg at $4.20. form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 13 at Baden Baden October 17 over 2400m, soft track; 6 len behind Royal Ito carrying 57kg at $4.20. On debut sixth of 8 at Cologne in the G2 May 4 over 2200m, 9 len behind Sunshine Baby with 58kg at $4.60. Could prove too smart for these.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 8th of 12 at this track on March 29 over 1600m, in the wet; 9 len behind Crefelder with 63kg at $6.70. Previously second-up second last of 10 at Hannover on May 1 over 2200m, 11 len behind Enzian carrying 57kg at $24.90. Likely improver.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at Cologne November 2 over 3000m, soft track; 1.5 len behind Miss Eagle with 58.5kg at $2.60.
